author: @GoTE_DocShock

text:
The editing is amazingly good for 2010. Some average YTPers are not even close to make their YTPs capable of a great and simple story with an impressive visual editing.
This way ahead of its time, Geibuchan is a genius. If you've watched a lot of classic poops from 2006-2009 you'll understand how much inspiration he had from them and how well-planned this YTP is as a result of it.
Thank you very much, Geibu. I've been watching YTPs since 2011, but I only discovered this YTP series a few months ago, and it just proves how underrated your YTP is.
